error_signature: cannot retrieve whole data from email
title: Incomplete email data retrieval in Gmail node
symptom: The Gmail node does not return the full content of emails when executed, leading to missing information.
applies_when: Email content is not fully retrieved
not_this_if: Email content is fully retrieved without issues
root_cause: The Gmail node has a 'Simplify' option that, when enabled, limits the amount of content retrieved from emails. Disabling this option allows for the full content to be fetched.
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Simplify' option in the Gmail node settings to retrieve the full email content.
